theme: Luna realizes Pickles the parrot has recorded every private conversation she's had with Milo. Pickles (Gen Z kitten energy) is now selling the tea to neighborhood animals. Luna's secret romance is trending on 'Pet TikTok.'

morning_scene.setting: Luna's living room couch; Pickles perched on a lamp; Kitten with a tiny phone documenting everything; Instagram-style overlays and notification sounds for comedic effect
morning_scene.what_happened: Pickles. Why am I trending on PetTok?
morning_scene.script_summary: Pickles. Why am I trending on PetTok? I monetized your conversations. You're welcome. You WHAT? Those were PRIVATE with Milo!
